validation_results.code_quality: Excellent - comprehensive hermetic test coverage with credential hygiene verification, optimized runtime, and clear test organization

criteria_verification.notes: 78 tests pass in 7.46s with FLEET_MEMORY_PG_DSN and FLEET_MEMORY_EMBED_URL unset, confirmed hermetic by quality gates
test_credential_hygiene.py contains 9 tests verifying passwords (SECRETPASS123, TOPSECRET999, HIDDENPASS456) never appear in error messages from EmbedServiceError or bad DSN failures
test_missing_all_required_fields_names_each_field verifies ValidationError contains both 'pg_dsn' and 'embed_url' field names in error message

Complete coverage verified: settings defaults/precedence (TestSettingsDefaults/TestSettingsEnvPrecedence), namespace hyphen rejection (test_hyphen_namespace_explicit), all four dimension mismatches [512/767/769/1024], embed timeout (test_timeout_raises_embed_timeout_error), fake-embed store-factory (test_factory_construction_with_fake_embed), lifespan enter/exit (test_lifespan_enters_and_exits_cleanly_with_fake_store)
Suite completes in 7.46s (under 10s requirement). Player optimized test_startup_failure_with_unreachable_database timeout from 5s to 2s, reducing total runtime from 10.44s to 7.46s

Grep verification confirms no direct psycopg imports in tests/unit/ (only in test assertions checking settings.py), no __aenter__ calls against real DSN (only hasattr checks), test_store_validation.py documents 'factory construction only'

rationale: All 6 acceptance criteria verified with deterministic evidence. Quality gates passed (tests_passed, coverage_met, arch_review_passed, plan_audit_passed). 78 hermetic tests pass in 7.46s with no database/network dependencies. Comprehensive coverage includes credential hygiene verification, settings validation, dimension mismatches, timeouts, and lifespan management. Honesty discrepancies are minor 'should_fix' reporting issues (listing files from previous turns in implementation_files) with honesty_score 1.0 indicating no fabrication. No absence-of-failure guards triggered. Task complete.
